flickering_rune.title: The Flickering Rune
flickering_rune.description: Nomagio's Apprentice is patching reality-leaks and needs a Flickering Rune Fragment from deep in the Crystal Caverns. Find it and bring it back before the cycle ends.
flickering_rune.hint: The shard is said to glint among The Sparkling Depths.

questItems.name: Flickering Rune Fragment
questItems.description: A shard of resonance crystal, etched with a rune that flickers like a dying computer monitor. Warm to the touch.

silenced_whisper.title: Silence the Whisper
silenced_whisper.description: A Bookworm is chewing through forbidden pages in the Ethereal Library. The Scribe wants it silenced. Permanently.
silenced_whisper.hint: Hunt a Bookworm among the shelves of the Ethereal Library.

objectives.description: Slay a Bookworm in the Ethereal Library

wind_the_clock.title: Wind Thessarian's Clock
wind_the_clock.description: The cycle-clock is slowing. Touch three observatory waypoints in sequence and return to the Clockwatcher before time runs out.
wind_the_clock.hint: Visit room_088, room_091, and room_095 - in any order - then return.

feed_the_void.title: Feed the Void
feed_the_void.description: The Void Merchant requires a tribute of 200 gold. Hand it over and the Void will remember you - possibly fondly.
feed_the_void.hint: Use 'give 200 gold merchant' in the Vacant Chamber.

objectives.description: Give 200 gold to the Void Merchant

collect_five_instruments.title: The Shattered Symphony
collect_five_instruments.description: Reality is out of tune. Five Primordial Instruments must be recovered from the harmonic realm beyond level 15, and played together in the Zero Point Chamber to sing the world home.
collect_five_instruments.hint: Beyond the Gatekeeper of Resonance. Seek the five wizards and their instruments; the Silver Harp sleeps in Lyralei's garden.

objectives.description: Claim the Obsidian Drum-Stave (from Morwyn Ironheart)
Retrieve the Silver Harp of Creation (Lyralei's garden, room 138)
Claim the Golden Trumpet of Change (from the Recursive Zephyros)
Claim the Lute of Whispering Shadows (from Nyxara)
Claim the Crystal Flute of Wisdom (from Thessarian the Patient)
